content.query:
SELECT TOP 100 *
FROM ZDI.ContainerAuto
WHERE [Container Number(s)] IS NOT NULL AND [Carrier Name]='EUSU' AND TRY_CONVERT(date, [Invoice Date])>'6/30/2024'  -- AND [Container Number(s)] IS NOT NULL

SELECT TOP 100 [Carrier Name], Division, [Status], COUNT(*)
FROM ZDI.ContainerAuto
WHERE [Carrier Name]='EUSU'
GROUP BY [Carrier Name], Division, []
ORDER BY [Carrier Name]

SELECT TOP 100 Division, COUNT(*)
FROM ZDI.ContainerAuto
GROUP BY Division
